zh.title: 12 课从零手写 AI Agent
zh.subtitle: shareAI-lab 开源教程用纯 Bash 拆解 Claude Code 核心架构，单日涨星 566
zh.tldr: shareAI-lab 发布开源项目 learn-claude-code，通过 12 节渐进式课程从零构建类 Claude Code 的 AI Agent，涵盖 Agent Loop、子代理、上下文压缩、多代理协作等核心机制，已获 24,000+ Stars。
zh.whatHappened:
新加坡开源组织 shareAI-lab 发布了 [learn-claude-code](https://github.com/shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code) 项目，这是一套从零构建类 Claude Code AI Agent 的渐进式教程。项目包含 12 节课程（s01-s12），每节对应一个可独立运行的 Python 文件，从最简单的 Agent Loop 逐步叠加工具调度、任务规划、子代理、技能加载、上下文压缩、多代理协作、Git Worktree 隔离等机制。

项目核心理念是「模型就是 Agent，我们的工作只是给它工具然后让路」。v0 版本仅用 16-50 行 Bash/Python 即实现基础 Agent，完整版（s_full.py）整合全部 12 种机制也仅约 550 行代码。项目提供中英日三语文档和交互式 Web 学习平台。

截至今日，项目已获 24,000+ Stars、4,400+ Forks，单日新增 566 Stars。shareAI-lab 同时维护 Kode-CLI（4,500 Stars 的生产级 Agent）和 mini-claude-code 等关联项目，形成从教学到生产的完整生态。
zh.whyItMatters:
当前 AI Agent 开发领域存在一个显著矛盾：Claude Code、Cursor 等工具已经证明 AI Agent 能大幅提升开发效率，但多数开发者对其内部工作原理缺乏深入理解，导致在定制、调试和优化 Agent 时无从下手。

learn-claude-code 的价值在于将 Claude Code 的核心架构拆解为 12 个可理解、可运行的模块。开发者不仅能理解「Agent Loop + Tool Use」这一基础范式，还能掌握上下文压缩（3 层策略）、任务持久化（依赖图）、多代理通信（JSONL 邮箱协议）等生产级机制。这些知识直接适用于构建自定义 Agent、排查 Agent 行为异常、以及评估各类 Agent 框架的技术选型。

从行业趋势看，这是「理解 Agent 比使用 Agent 更重要」这一认知转变的典型案例——能拆解 Agent 的开发者将在 AI 原生开发时代获得更强的竞争力。

groups.name: AI Agent 开发者
groups.description: 直接受益：可通过 12 节课系统掌握 Agent 核心架构，将「黑盒使用」升级为「白盒理解」，显著提升自建和调优 Agent 的能力

groups.name: Claude Code / Cursor 日常用户
groups.description: 理解底层机制有助于更高效地使用这些工具——例如理解上下文压缩策略后可以更好地管理长会话，理解 TodoManager 后可以优化任务拆分方式

groups.name: AI 技术教育者和内容创作者
groups.description: 项目提供了结构清晰的教学素材和三语文档，可直接用于课程设计、技术写作和工作坊内容

groups.name: 企业技术团队负责人
groups.description: 可作为团队 Agent 能力建设的学习资源，但教学项目本身不可直接用于生产环境

immediate: 克隆仓库并运行第一课：`git clone https://github.com/shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code && cd learn-claude-code && pip install -r requirements.txt && python agents/s01_agent_loop.py`，体验最小 Agent Loop 的运行逻辑
thisWeek: 按顺序完成 s01-s06 六节课（Agent Loop -> 工具调度 -> 任务规划 -> 子代理 -> 技能加载 -> 上下文压缩），每节约 30-60 分钟，重点对照自己当前使用的 Agent 工具理解各机制的作用
阅读 docs 目录下的架构文档，特别是上下文压缩（3 层策略）和多代理通信（JSONL 邮箱）的设计文档，评估是否可以借鉴到自己的项目中
watchAndWait: 关注 shareAI-lab 的 Kode-CLI 项目（4,500 Stars），这是 learn-claude-code 教学内容的生产级实现，可作为从学习到应用的桥梁
跟踪项目后续是否新增更多高级主题（如 MCP 协议集成、权限治理等），这些是当前 12 课尚未覆盖的生产级需求

options.name: 系统学习全部 12 课
options.suitableFor: 希望深入理解 Agent 架构的开发者
options.risk: 教学实现与生产级 Agent 存在差距，需注意区分
options.description: 从 s01 到 s12 逐步完成所有课程，配合文档和 Web 平台，全面掌握 Agent 核心机制。

options.name: 选择性学习关键模块
options.suitableFor: 有一定 Agent 开发经验、只需补齐特定知识的开发者
options.risk: 跳过基础课程可能影响对后续高级机制的理解
options.description: 根据自身需求选学特定课程，如 s06（上下文压缩）、s09（多代理协作）、s12（Worktree 隔离）等高级主题。

options.name: 基于教程构建自定义 Agent
options.suitableFor: 正在开发 Agent 产品的团队
options.risk: 教学代码未经生产验证，需要补充错误处理、安全机制和性能优化
options.description: 以 s_full.py 为起点，结合 Kode-CLI 的生产级实践，构建适合自己场景的 Agent。

options.name: 保持现状
options.suitableFor: 当前不涉及 Agent 开发、或已有成熟 Agent 架构的团队
options.risk: 随着 Agent 成为标准开发范式，缺乏底层理解可能影响长期技术竞争力
options.description: 不做任何变更，将项目收藏备用，在需要时再进行学习。

risks.title: 将教学代码直接用于生产环境
risks.description: 项目明确声明省略了完整的事件/钩子系统、权限治理、会话生命周期管理等生产级功能。团队 JSONL 邮箱协议被标注为教学实现。如需投产，应参考 Kode-CLI 等生产级项目补充安全、错误处理和可观测性机制。

risks.title: 过度简化对 Agent 架构复杂性的认知
risks.description: 项目强调「模型就是 Agent」的极简理念，但生产环境中 Agent 还需处理速率限制、成本控制、多租户隔离、审计日志等工程问题。学习时需保持对实际工程挑战的清醒认识。

risks.title: API Key 安全风险
risks.description: 教程使用 .env 文件存储 Anthropic API Key。学习过程中应注意不要将 API Key 提交到公开仓库，建议使用环境变量或密钥管理工具。

sources.title: GitHub: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
sources.excerpt: 开源仓库，MIT 许可证，24,000+ Stars / 4,400+ Forks。包含 12 节渐进式课程，从基础 Agent Loop 到 Git Worktree 隔离执行，附带中英日三语文档和交互式 Web 学习平台。

sources.title: shareAI-Lab GitHub 组织页
sources.excerpt: 新加坡 AI 开源组织，1,700+ 关注者，维护 35 个仓库。核心项目包括 Kode-CLI（4,500 Stars 生产级 Agent）、learn-claude-code（教学项目）、kode-agent-sdk（嵌入式 Agent 运行时）。

sources.title: 拆解 Claude Code：Coding Agent 终于「能用」背后的架构真相
sources.excerpt: 深度技术分析 Claude Code 的内部架构，包括 Agent Loop、工具系统、上下文管理等核心机制，与 learn-claude-code 项目的教学内容形成互补参考。

sources.title: HelloGitHub: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
sources.excerpt: 项目收录于 HelloGitHub 开源项目推荐平台，分类为「从零构建 AI Agent」教学项目。

en.title: Build an AI Agent in 12 Lessons
en.subtitle: Open-source tutorial deconstructs Claude Code's core architecture with pure Bash, gains 566 stars in one day
en.tldr: shareAI-lab released learn-claude-code, a 12-lesson progressive tutorial that builds a Claude Code-like AI agent from scratch, covering agent loops, subagents, context compression, and multi-agent coordination. The project has 24,000+ GitHub stars.
en.whatHappened:
Singapore-based open-source organization shareAI-lab published [learn-claude-code](https://github.com/shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code), a progressive tutorial for building a Claude Code-like AI agent from the ground up. The project contains 12 lessons (s01-s12), each with a standalone runnable Python file, progressively layering mechanisms from a basic agent loop to tool dispatch, task planning, subagents, skill loading, context compression, multi-agent coordination, and Git worktree isolation.

The core philosophy is "the model is the agent -- our job is to give it tools and stay out of the way." The v0 version implements a basic agent in just 16-50 lines of Bash/Python, while the full capstone (s_full.py) integrates all 12 mechanisms in roughly 550 lines. Documentation is available in English, Chinese, and Japanese, with an interactive web learning platform.

As of today, the project has 24,000+ stars, 4,400+ forks, and gained 566 stars in a single day. shareAI-lab also maintains Kode-CLI (a 4,500-star production agent) and mini-claude-code, forming a complete ecosystem from education to production.
en.whyItMatters:
There is a growing gap in the AI agent space: tools like Claude Code and Cursor have proven that AI agents can dramatically boost developer productivity, but most developers lack deep understanding of how these agents work internally. This makes customization, debugging, and optimization extremely difficult.

learn-claude-code addresses this by decomposing Claude Code's core architecture into 12 understandable, runnable modules. Developers learn not just the fundamental "Agent Loop + Tool Use" pattern, but also production-grade mechanisms like three-layer context compression, file-based task persistence with dependency graphs, and multi-agent communication via JSONL mailbox protocols. This knowledge directly applies to building custom agents, troubleshooting agent behavior, and evaluating agent framework choices.

From an industry perspective, this project exemplifies a critical shift: understanding agents matters more than just using them. Developers who can deconstruct agent architectures will hold a significant competitive advantage in the AI-native development era.

groups.name: AI Agent Developers
groups.description: Direct benefit: systematically learn agent core architecture through 12 lessons, upgrading from black-box usage to white-box understanding, significantly improving ability to build and tune custom agents

groups.name: Claude Code / Cursor Daily Users
groups.description: Understanding internals helps use these tools more effectively -- e.g., managing long sessions better after learning context compression, or optimizing task breakdown after understanding TodoManager

groups.name: AI Educators and Content Creators
groups.description: The project provides well-structured teaching materials with three-language documentation, directly usable for course design, technical writing, and workshop content

groups.name: Engineering Team Leads
groups.description: Useful as a team learning resource for building agent competency, but the teaching code itself is not production-ready

immediate: Clone the repo and run lesson 1: `git clone https://github.com/shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code && cd learn-claude-code && pip install -r requirements.txt && python agents/s01_agent_loop.py` to experience the minimal agent loop in action
thisWeek: Complete lessons s01-s06 in order (Agent Loop -> Tool Dispatch -> Task Planning -> Subagents -> Skill Loading -> Context Compression), spending 30-60 minutes each, mapping each mechanism to the agent tools you currently use
Read the architecture docs, especially on context compression (3-layer strategy) and multi-agent communication (JSONL mailbox), and evaluate whether these patterns apply to your projects
watchAndWait: Follow shareAI-lab's Kode-CLI project (4,500 stars) -- it is the production-grade implementation of what learn-claude-code teaches, serving as a bridge from learning to deployment
Watch for additional advanced topics (MCP protocol integration, permission governance) that the current 12 lessons do not yet cover

options.name: Complete all 12 lessons systematically
options.suitableFor: Developers seeking deep understanding of agent architecture
options.risk: Teaching implementations differ from production agents; be aware of the gap
options.description: Work through s01 to s12 sequentially, using docs and the web platform to fully master core agent mechanisms.

options.name: Selectively study key modules
options.suitableFor: Experienced agent developers looking to fill specific knowledge gaps
options.risk: Skipping foundational lessons may hinder understanding of advanced mechanisms
options.description: Pick specific lessons based on your needs, such as s06 (context compression), s09 (multi-agent coordination), or s12 (worktree isolation).

options.name: Build a custom agent based on the tutorial
options.risk: Teaching code is not production-validated; needs error handling, security, and performance hardening
options.description: Use s_full.py as a starting point, combined with Kode-CLI's production practices, to build an agent tailored to your use case.

options.name: Do nothing
options.suitableFor: Teams not involved in agent development or with mature agent architectures
options.risk: As agents become the standard development paradigm, lacking foundational understanding may affect long-term competitiveness
options.description: Bookmark the project for future reference and revisit when the need arises.

risks.title: Using teaching code directly in production
risks.description: The project explicitly omits full event/hook systems, permission governance, and session lifecycle management. The team JSONL mailbox protocol is labeled a teaching implementation. For production use, refer to Kode-CLI and add security, error handling, and observability layers.

risks.title: Oversimplifying agent architecture complexity
risks.description: The project emphasizes a minimalist 'the model is the agent' philosophy, but production agents must also handle rate limiting, cost control, multi-tenant isolation, and audit logging. Maintain awareness of real-world engineering challenges while learning.

risks.title: API key security exposure
risks.description: The tutorial stores the Anthropic API key in a .env file. Ensure you never commit API keys to public repositories during the learning process. Use environment variables or secret management tools instead.

sources.title: GitHub: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
sources.excerpt: Open-source repo under MIT license. 24,000+ stars / 4,400+ forks. Contains 12 progressive lessons from basic agent loop to Git worktree isolation, with documentation in English, Chinese, and Japanese plus an interactive web learning platform.

sources.title: shareAI-Lab GitHub Organization
sources.excerpt: Singapore-based AI open-source org with 1,700+ followers and 35 repositories. Key projects include Kode-CLI (4,500 stars production agent), learn-claude-code (teaching project), and kode-agent-sdk (embeddable agent runtime).

sources.title: Deconstructing Claude Code: The Architecture Behind the First Usable Coding Agent
sources.excerpt: In-depth technical analysis of Claude Code internals including agent loop, tool system, and context management -- provides complementary reference for learn-claude-code's teaching content.

sources.title: HelloGitHub: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
sources.excerpt: Project featured on HelloGitHub open-source discovery platform, categorized as a 'Build AI Agent from Scratch' educational project.
